calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To May-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To May-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada, via Zoom, for Dexter Tracy, Petitioner; Shelley Clark, via Zoom, for Derek Tracy, Respondent.

The court acknowledges counsel's joint case management statement and queries counsel as to how they'd like to proceed. Mr. Dada believes that mediation seems appropriate and since some discovery is pending, suggests a continuance of four (4) months. Ms. Clark reports that she was hoping that the court would set a trial date and mandatory settlement conference. The court recognizes counsel's individual positions and advises that it is inclined to order the parties to private mediation pursuant to Breslin v. Breslin. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the status of the matter specifically regarding obtaining appraisals of the real properties and the court's tentative order regarding mediation.

After additional discussion, the parties are ordered to private mediation in open court. Mediation is to be completed by Mar-17-2023 and a joint Status Report on mediation is to be filed by Mar-22-2023. The Parties are to return on Mar-29-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The subject matters are continued to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada, for Dexter Tracy, Petitioner; Robyn Christo, via Zoom, for and with Derek Tracy, Respondent.

Mr. Dada reports on the status of this matter and that there is a delay caused by the difficulty in appraising a real property of the trust and suggests that the best way to find the true value of the property is to put it for sale on the open market and distribute the proceeds from the sale. Mr. Dada asks the court to order the sale of the property, giving Bryan Tracy right of refusal so that he can attempt to buy the property, to avoid any issues. Ms. Christo disagrees with Mr. Dada's report regarding the appraisal process advises that this is the first time hearing of Mr. Dada's proposal and that there was an agreement regarding distribution as of over one year ago. Ms. Christo advises of being amenable to mediation and requests an evidentiary hearing to resolve this matter as soon as possible. After additional argument by counsel, the court acknowledges Ms. Christo's request and advises that there seems to be room for this matter to settle. The court advises that it will be issuing a Case Management Order and advises counsel to file a Joint Case Management Statement.

The matter is continued to Dec-19-2022 at 9:00 am. In Dept. 204. A Case Management Hearing is set for the same date. Counsel is instructed to file a Joint Case Management Statement by Dec-09-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada, via Zoom, for Dexter Tracy, Respondent; Shelley Clark, specially appearing for Robyn Christo, via Zoom, for Derek Tracy, Petitioner; Bryan Tracy, via Zoom, in propria persona, Interested Party.

The court and counsel discuss their meet and confer efforts with Mr. Dada reporting that he spoke with Ms. Christo and mediation is possible, but he believes that there are some key issues that require resolution regarding the trust estate before settlement discussions can begin. Mr. Dada advises of obtaining appraisals of the real properties and would like for the real properties to be sold in the open market and the sale proceeds distributed. Ms. Clarke reports that a first accounting is almost complete and that it should be filed within a few weeks. Ms. Clarke advises that discovery has been served and that Ms. Christo also suggested mediation and requests a continuance of this matter accordingly. Mr. Dada agrees to Ms. Christo's suggestion to continue. Mr. Tracy offers an update regarding the appraisals of the trust's real properties.

After additional discussion, the Petition is continued to Oct-17-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises the parties that it intends to issue a Case Management Order by the next calling of this matter if the parties have not reached an agreement by then.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To Jun-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada, via Zoom, for Dexter Tracy, Petitioner; Robyn Christo, via Zoom, for Derek Tracy, Respondent.

Ms. Christo confirms that she does not intend to file an objection to the amended petition and that her original objection will be treated as an objection to the amended petition. Mr. Dada reports of a plan to meet and confer and requests a continuance to allow the parties to do so. Ms. Christo reports of the resolution of several issues and does not oppose a continuance to discuss the remaining issues. The court advises the parties that if a continuance is granted and the case is not resolved by the next calling, the court will likely issue a Case Management Order.

The Petition is continued to Jun-27-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Distribute Assets
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Continued To Apr-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada, via ZOOM, for Dexter Tracy, Petitioner; Robyn Christo, via ZOOM, for Derek Tracy, Trustee.

Mr. Dada reports that there have been delays in distribution to his client and requests that the court order a preliminary distribution. Ms. Christo doesn't believe that Mr. Dada's request is appropriate and advises that she has issues with Mr. Dada's petition and points to the amended petition filed sua sponte by Mr. Dada after she had filed a response to his original petition. Mr. Dada reports that his client has waited four years for distribution and needs money, now. After additional discussion, the court orders the parties to meet and confer and instructs Ms. Christo to discuss the possibility of a preliminary distribution with her client.

The Petition to Compel Trustee Accounting, etc. is continued to Apr-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody (via ZOOM). Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
